<style media="screen">
    section.module-special-cats {
    }
    section.module-special-cats .special-card {
        background: #ddeff4 0 0 no-repeat padding-box;
        border-radius: 8px;
        height: 150px; width: 100%;
        position: relative;
        margin: 10px 0px;
    }
    section.module-special-cats .special-card a {
        display: block;
        height: 100%; width: 100%;
    }
    section.module-special-cats .special-card a .card {
        display: flex;
        padding: 25px;
    }
    section.module-special-cats .special-card a .card .circle {
        height: 100px; width: 100px;
        border-radius: 100%;
        border: 3px solid #395A4F;
        line-height: 100px;
        color: #395A4F;
        font-weight: 800;
        text-align: center;
        font-size: 25px;
    }
    section.module-special-cats .special-card a .card .text {
        height: 100px; width: calc(100% - 100px);
        line-height: 100px;
        letter-spacing: -1.28px;
        color: #395A4F;
        font-size: 30px;
        font-weight: 700;
    }
    section.module-special-cats .special-card a .card.left .text {
        text-align: right;
    }
    section.module-special-cats .special-card a .card.right .text {
        text-align: left;
    }
</style>

<section class="banner-ysynsr">
    <div class="container">
        <div class="banner-ysynsr">
            <div class="ysynsr-blue-bg">
                <div class="row">
                    <div class="col-12 col-xl-4 col-lg-5 col-md-5 col-sm-5">
                        <img src="https://cdn.hekimce.com/images/banner-ysynsr.png" alt="Yaşayana Sor Temsili Simgesi" class="ysynsr-image">
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-12 col-xl-6 col-lg-7 col-md-7 col-sm-7">
                        <div class="ysynsr-content">
                            <p class="ysynsr-slogan">Yaşayana Sor</p>
                            <p class="ysynsr-info">Hastalıklarından bahset, <b>yaşayanlar deneyimlerini</b> seninle <b>paylaşsın.</b></p>

                        <div class="ysynsr-circle">

                            FORUMU
